summary: LLM proxy: system-prompt exfiltration via "ignore previous instructions" jailbreak through copilotRelay endpoint
Cross-tenant Firestore read: clinician in tenant A can list /tenants/B/patients when custom claim 'tid' is briefly stale after role change
RAG client API key (RAG_API_KEY) embedded in web build bundle when --dart-define passes plaintext; visible in DevTools Source
WebAuthn authentication: no per-IP rate limit on /passkeyAuth challenge endpoint enables credential-id enumeration timing attack
PHI leakage in Cloud Logging: unhandled exceptions in passkey_authenticate.ts include raw uid + credential id when verification throws before redaction
Stripe webhook replay window 15 minutes in checkout_service exceeds Stripe recommendation of 5 minutes; signed event replay possible during clock skew
Telehealth room token visible in Referer header when participant clicks external citation link in session notes panel
Audit log hash-chain integrity verification only triggered on Trust Center page load; accessReviewCron does not assert chain before access review
Patient PWA service worker caches authenticated /portal/inbox responses; shared kiosk session reveals prior patient inbox after logout
iOS Hand-off NSUserActivity title contains patient initials when SessionHandoffActivity broadcasts; visible on locked Apple Watch glance
Healthcheck deep mode (/healthcheck?deep=true) callable without auth allows IAM listUsers timing enumeration of clinician emails
Patient self-service invite link valid for 7 days and reusable; should be one-time-use with 24h expiry per OWASP ASVS V2.3.1
